'''Trix-sor''' was a retired [[Sic-Six/Legends|Sic-Six]].

==Biography==
Trix-sor worked as a "[[Fanging|fanger]]" for an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]], injecting both the aristocrat and his friends with his natural "[[Poison/Legends|poison]]" which caused a state of delirium.<ref name="GG2-2" />

A [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] addict with expensive tastes, Trix-sor eventually retired to [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] to live a life full of fine food, [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]], and constant celebration. He lived in a private suite at the [[H'gaard Park Towers]] [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] overlooking [[Figg Plaza]] and refused to become a citizen of Cloud City so that he could openly enjoy the city's [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] and gambling.<ref name="GG2-2" />

Trix-sor lived off his fortune and was on good terms with his neighbors, many of whom were members of the [[Exex]]. He also had a great number of friends who stopped by for brief visits. Trix-sor was hired to be a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on Cloud City by the minor Imperial noble [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Spenz]]. Trix-sor reports on events and goings-on in Cloud City to Spenz, who hopes to use the information to increase his own power and influence.<ref name="GG2-2" />

==Personality and traits==
A polite being, Trix-sor was also sarcastic and found great joy in challenge of beating others in games of chance but was an exceptionally good sport. Trix-sor was fluent in nearly thirty [[Language/Legends|languages]] but his own speech was high-pitched and peppered with squeaks and chirps.<ref name="GG2-2" />

==Equipment==
Trix-sor wore fine [[Robe/Legends|robes]], and carried chemical vials and a small sack of ryll. He usually had 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] on his person.<ref name="GG2-2" />
